---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "[feature] <short summary>"
labels: type:feature
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What user-facing problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposal

Describe the change. If it touches a Top 10 Feature, name which one (#1 ~ #10).

## Roadmap mapping

Does this fit an existing roadmap item (F0.x, PR-A ~ PR-K)? If not, what new ADR would it require?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why this one?

## Out of scope

What this proposal explicitly does **not** change.
